name: salon-hours-24-7-always-open
description: User at SALON_HOURS types '24/7' or 'always open' — should be parsed into all-day-every-day hours by the LLM hours parser, NOT bailed to the standard Tue-Sat 9-7 default. Tests the parser's ability to handle the always-open edge case. Some salon spas / 24h walk-in chains DO operate this way.
